user_query: I've been stuck in meetings most of the week. Which days have nature activities where I can actually get outside?

selected_nodes.reasoning: Day 8 includes a Niagara Falls Day Trip — a full-day outdoor scenic adventure (falls, boat ride, time to explore) — clearly a nature/outdoor activity.
Day 6 includes the Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride — ferry to islands, bike exploration, beaches and gardens — explicitly an outdoor nature activity.
Day 1 includes a Harbourfront Stroll — an easy outdoor waterfront walk with fresh air and lake views.
